subject: merit-badge:camping

requirements.summary: Explain hazards you may encounter while camping and what to do about them.

children.summary: Anticipate, mitigate, and respond to camping hazards.
Discuss prevention and treatment of common camping health concerns.
Camp a total of at least 20 nights at designated Scouting activities or events (details and limits apply).
During the campouts above, do TWO of the following activities.
Hike up a mountain, gaining at least 1,000 feet of elevation.
Backpack, snowshoe, or ski for at least 4 miles.
Take a bike trip of at least 15 miles or 4 hours.
Plan and carry out an overnight snow camping experience.

provenance.notes: ILLUSTRATIVE EXAMPLE — structure approximates the 2016 revision (subset of requirements, paraphrased); do not import as data.

notes: Demonstrates: paraphrased summaries only (includes_official_text=false), nested children, and a choose-N option group (9b). A future revision would be a NEW document with supersedes='requirement-set:camping-2016'.
